news.title: Devina Mehra: why should India let foreign investors go beyond using derivatives to hedge portfolios?
news.description: While the country is trying maintain the rupee's exchange rate a reasonable level, foreign players are making speculative money off derivatives while draining our forex and the pockets of Indian retail investors. It’s time for restrictions.

news.title: ASX 200 Climbs 0.8% as Mining Giants and Tech Stocks Drive Gains Amid Global AI Optimism
news.description: The ASX 200 index rose 0.83% driven by strong performances in mining and technology sectors, despite mixed economic data and sector-specific pressures. Investors remain cautious amid global and domestic economic signals.

news.title: Gold Slips as Uncertainty Clouds Negotiations to End US-Iran War
news.description: Gold edged lower as renewed clashes in the Middle East cast doubt over negotiations between the US and Iran to end the war that’s upended energy flows and heightened inflation concerns.

news.title: Litchfield boosts NT base metals case with broad drill hits

news.title: Sydney Morning Herald takes down article after author admits using AI
